variables.notes: Selected 'Borrowing' as the best short-term debt line, but the same exact label also appears in the non-current liabilities section, so the row-label-only output is ambiguous and should be checked manually to ensure the current-liability instance is used.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: The label appears concatenated with the next section header, but the values clearly behave as total/net cash flow from operating activities.
